connectivity_tips.tip: Etisalat and Du are both widely used networks. Prepaid SIM cards are available for AED 50-100 depending on the plan and can be picked up at the airport.
connectivity_tips._source_file: Dubai and Abu Dhabi - UAE/Dubai and Abu Dhabi- All Inclusive Guide_Rituraj.pdf

connectivity_tips.tip: DU's packages are slightly cheaper than Etisalat's. Most people in Dubai use Du sim cards.
connectivity_tips._source_file: Dubai and Abu Dhabi - UAE/Dubai and Abu Dhabi- All Inclusive Guide_Rituraj.pdf

connectivity_tips.tip: Etisalat's 4G coverage is very good and available in every city and region. DU's 5G coverage is better than Etisalat's, but its 5G speed is slightly slower.
connectivity_tips._source_file: Dubai and Abu Dhabi - UAE/Dubai and Abu Dhabi- All Inclusive Guide_Rituraj.pdf

connectivity_tips.tip: Etisalat is one of the largest telecom operators in UAE, offers prepaid SIMs suitable for tourists with data, local calls, and international call bundles
connectivity_tips._source_file: Dubai and Abu Dhabi - UAE/Kush_All Inclsuive Guide_Dubai.pdf

connectivity_tips.tip: du (Emirates Integrated Telecommunications Company) provides prepaid tourist SIMs with data and voice packages
connectivity_tips._source_file: Dubai and Abu Dhabi - UAE/Kush_All Inclsuive Guide_Dubai.pdf

connectivity_tips.tip: Virgin Mobile UAE operates on the du network with flexible prepaid and postpaid plans, good for short-term visitors
connectivity_tips._source_file: Dubai and Abu Dhabi - UAE/Kush_All Inclsuive Guide_Dubai.pdf

connectivity_tips.tip: STC UAE (Saudi Telecom Company) offers prepaid and postpaid services, often used for data-heavy packages

safety_tips.tip: Dubai is generally very safe, but stay aware of your surroundings, especially in crowded areas
safety_tips._source_file: Dubai and Abu Dhabi - UAE/Kush_All Inclsuive Guide_Dubai.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Keep valuables (passport, money, gadgets) in a secure bag or hotel safe
safety_tips._source_file: Dubai and Abu Dhabi - UAE/Kush_All Inclsuive Guide_Dubai.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Avoid walking alone in poorly lit or isolated areas at night
safety_tips._source_file: Dubai and Abu Dhabi - UAE/Kush_All Inclsuive Guide_Dubai.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Use licensed taxis or ride-hailing apps (Careem, Uber)
safety_tips._source_file: Dubai and Abu Dhabi - UAE/Kush_All Inclsuive Guide_Dubai.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Always wear a seatbelt while in vehicles
safety_tips._source_file: Dubai and Abu Dhabi - UAE/Kush_All Inclsuive Guide_Dubai.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Follow local traffic rules and pedestrian crossings; jaywalking is fined
safety_tips._source_file: Dubai and Abu Dhabi - UAE/Kush_All Inclsuive Guide_Dubai.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Drink bottled water to avoid dehydration; tap water is generally safe but may taste different
safety_tips._source_file: Dubai and Abu Dhabi - UAE/Kush_All Inclsuive Guide_Dubai.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Use sunscreen, sunglasses, and hats to protect against sun exposure
safety_tips._source_file: Dubai and Abu Dhabi - UAE/Kush_All Inclsuive Guide_Dubai.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Beware of overcharging in taxis – Some drivers may take longer routes; always use the meter or app-based rides
safety_tips._source_file: Dubai and Abu Dhabi - UAE/Kush_All Inclsuive Guide_Dubai.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Beware of overpriced goods or counterfeit items in markets and malls
safety_tips._source_file: Dubai and Abu Dhabi - UAE/Kush_All Inclsuive Guide_Dubai.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Beware of strangers offering unsolicited help, gifts, or tours may demand payment later
safety_tips._source_file: Dubai and Abu Dhabi - UAE/Kush_All Inclsuive Guide_Dubai.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Keep bags zipped and valuables secure in crowded areas
safety_tips._source_file: Dubai and Abu Dhabi - UAE/Kush_All Inclsuive Guide_Dubai.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Only donate through recognized organizations
safety_tips._source_file: Dubai and Abu Dhabi - UAE/Kush_All Inclsuive Guide_Dubai.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Use ATMs inside malls or banks; shield your PIN while entering
safety_tips._source_file: Dubai and Abu Dhabi - UAE/Kush_All Inclsuive Guide_Dubai.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Beware of street hawkers / sellers offering overpriced goods or counterfeit items in markets and malls
safety_tips._source_file: Dubai and Abu Dhabi - UAE/Hrishita_All Inclusive Guide_Dubai.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Avoid 'friendly locals' scams – Strangers offering unsolicited help, gifts, or tours may demand payment later
safety_tips._source_file: Dubai and Abu Dhabi - UAE/Hrishita_All Inclusive Guide_Dubai.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Keep bags zipped and valuables secure in crowded areas to prevent pickpocketing
safety_tips._source_file: Dubai and Abu Dhabi - UAE/Hrishita_All Inclusive Guide_Dubai.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Only donate through recognized organizations to avoid fake charity scams
safety_tips._source_file: Dubai and Abu Dhabi - UAE/Hrishita_All Inclusive Guide_Dubai.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Use ATMs inside malls or banks; shield your PIN while entering to prevent card fraud
safety_tips._source_file: Dubai and Abu Dhabi - UAE/Hrishita_All Inclusive Guide_Dubai.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Beware of overcharging in taxis – Some drivers may take longer routes; always use the meter or app-based rides (Careem/Uber)
safety_tips._source_file: Dubai and Abu Dhabi - UAE/Shivani and Saurabh_Abu Dhabi and Dubai-All inclusive guide.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Beware of street hawkers / sellers – overpriced goods or counterfeit items in markets and malls
safety_tips._source_file: Dubai and Abu Dhabi - UAE/Shivani and Saurabh_Abu Dhabi and Dubai-All inclusive guide.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Beware of "Friendly locals" scams – Strangers offering unsolicited help, gifts, or tours may demand payment later
safety_tips._source_file: Dubai and Abu Dhabi - UAE/Shivani and Saurabh_Abu Dhabi and Dubai-All inclusive guide.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Pickpocketing is rare, but keep bags zipped and valuables secure in crowded areas
safety_tips._source_file: Dubai and Abu Dhabi - UAE/Shivani and Saurabh_Abu Dhabi and Dubai-All inclusive guide.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Only donate through recognized organizations for charity requests
safety_tips._source_file: Dubai and Abu Dhabi - UAE/Shivani and Saurabh_Abu Dhabi and Dubai-All inclusive guide.pdf

safety_tips.tip: During Ramadan, eat and drink in restaurants/cafes and designated areas only, out of respect
safety_tips._source_file: Dubai and Abu Dhabi - UAE/Dubai- All Inclusive Guide_Shakuntala.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Do not drink water in public during Ramadan
safety_tips._source_file: Dubai and Abu Dhabi - UAE/Dubai- All Inclusive Guide_Shakuntala.pdf

health_tips.tip: Travel Insurance recommended - TATA AIG
health_tips._source_file: Dubai and Abu Dhabi - UAE/Abu Dhabi and Dubai- All Inclusive Guide.pdf

health_tips.tip: Carry doctors prescriptions/travel prescriptions for medicines (except over the counter meds)
health_tips._source_file: Dubai and Abu Dhabi - UAE/Abu Dhabi and Dubai- All Inclusive Guide.pdf

health_tips.tip: Carry water with you whenever stepping out as weather can be warm during the day
health_tips._source_file: Dubai and Abu Dhabi - UAE/Abu Dhabi and Dubai- All Inclusive Guide.pdf

health_tips.tip: Ensure you are up-to-date with MMR, DPT, Polio, Tetanus, and Influenza vaccinations
health_tips._source_file: Dubai and Abu Dhabi - UAE/Kush_All Inclsuive Guide_Dubai.pdf

health_tips.tip: Hepatitis A & B recommended especially if you plan to eat street food
health_tips._source_file: Dubai and Abu Dhabi - UAE/Kush_All Inclsuive Guide_Dubai.pdf

health_tips.tip: Typhoid vaccination recommended for travelers visiting local markets or street vendors
health_tips._source_file: Dubai and Abu Dhabi - UAE/Kush_All Inclsuive Guide_Dubai.pdf

health_tips.tip: Drink bottled water for safety
health_tips._source_file: Dubai and Abu Dhabi - UAE/Kush_All Inclsuive Guide_Dubai.pdf

health_tips.tip: Use sunscreen, hats, and sunglasses; temperatures can be very high
health_tips._source_file: Dubai and Abu Dhabi - UAE/Kush_All Inclsuive Guide_Dubai.pdf

health_tips.tip: Drink plenty of fluids to prevent dehydration in hot weather
health_tips._source_file: Dubai and Abu Dhabi - UAE/Kush_All Inclsuive Guide_Dubai.pdf

health_tips.tip: Ensure travel insurance covers medical emergencies
health_tips._source_file: Dubai and Abu Dhabi - UAE/Kush_All Inclsuive Guide_Dubai.pdf

health_tips.tip: Carry basic medications for fever, stomach upset, allergies, and motion sickness
health_tips._source_file: Dubai and Abu Dhabi - UAE/Kush_All Inclsuive Guide_Dubai.pdf

health_tips.tip: Recommended vaccines include Hepatitis A & B, especially if you plan to eat street food
health_tips._source_file: Dubai and Abu Dhabi - UAE/Hrishita_All Inclusive Guide_Dubai.pdf

health_tips.tip: Consider Typhoid vaccination for travelers visiting local markets or street vendors
health_tips._source_file: Dubai and Abu Dhabi - UAE/Hrishita_All Inclusive Guide_Dubai.pdf

health_tips.tip: Drink bottled water to avoid dehydration and stomach issues
health_tips._source_file: Dubai and Abu Dhabi - UAE/Hrishita_All Inclusive Guide_Dubai.pdf

health_tips.tip: Use sunscreen, hats, and sunglasses as temperatures can be very high
health_tips._source_file: Dubai and Abu Dhabi - UAE/Hrishita_All Inclusive Guide_Dubai.pdf

health_tips.tip: Travel Insurance recommended - TATA AIG. Weather is very hot with maximum temperatures up to 37 degrees. Carry summer caps, sunscreen, light cotton clothes and water when stepping out.
health_tips._source_file: Dubai and Abu Dhabi - UAE/Dubai- All Inclusive Guide.pdf

health_tips.tip: Ensure you are up-to-date with routine vaccinations: MMR, DPT, Polio, Tetanus, and Influenza
health_tips._source_file: Dubai and Abu Dhabi - UAE/Shivani and Saurabh_Abu Dhabi and Dubai-All inclusive guide.pdf

health_tips.tip: Recommended vaccines include Hepatitis A & B (especially if you plan to eat street food) and Typhoid (for travelers visiting local markets or street vendors)
health_tips._source_file: Dubai and Abu Dhabi - UAE/Shivani and Saurabh_Abu Dhabi and Dubai-All inclusive guide.pdf

health_tips.tip: Drink bottled water for food & water safety
health_tips._source_file: Dubai and Abu Dhabi - UAE/Shivani and Saurabh_Abu Dhabi and Dubai-All inclusive guide.pdf

health_tips.tip: Use sunscreen, hats, and sunglasses for sun protection; temperatures can be very high
health_tips._source_file: Dubai and Abu Dhabi - UAE/Shivani and Saurabh_Abu Dhabi and Dubai-All inclusive guide.pdf

health_tips.tip: Weather ranges from 21 to 33 degrees, carry summer caps, sunscreen and light cotton clothes, always carry water
health_tips._source_file: Dubai and Abu Dhabi - UAE/Dubai- All Inclusive Guide_Shakuntala.pdf
